item.title: How to tie conservatives in knots.
item.dc:creator: algoritham

item.title: YouTube has now begun skipping videos altogether for users with ad blockers
item.description:
https://www.androidpolice.com/youtube-videos-skip-to-end-if-you-use-an-ad-blocker/
it's easy as wiping your butt. Just copy and paste the link or click the box in the middle where it tells you to click and hit start. it will show up in your downloads folder. no ads, no interruptions, no overlays. just video. at the highest quality. it's also able to get that 'enhanced 1080p' bullshit they're trying to pull. here's the open source https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp for you all you nerds (i envy you) here's the direct link for the GUI for us ignorant folk that need buttons. https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/yt-dlp.exe ezpz lemon fuck your profits.
If you're having trouble with ads or watching videos that you're supposed to be able to in your country, (otherwise you'll need to use a vpn) you can use this nifty little ripper.
item.dc:creator: DietLoki

item.dc:creator: CrazyCatLacey

item.title: Hello world! My egg cracked open!
item.description: Hello world! My egg cracked, and I'm now free! It's lovely to meet you all! So, I'm aware that the waiting list for the gender clinics in the UK are extreme, So I'm wondering if any of you beautiful folk can point me in the direction of alternative sources for T Blockers and E, please feel free to DM me any relevant info! I love you all P.S, for Anyone that likes and wants this pin, I got it from amazon
item.dc:creator: sythenelexia

15. Did Malta do any?! P.S. If you liked the humor of this dump I think you might like my wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game, called "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)"! Please wishlist, it would really encourage me to finish it: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/

item.title: Time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
obviously
reasonable
that's a paddlin'
well it is pretty cringe
hersheys is best for smores, and thats about it
my god he's right
mmm hmm
counterpoint: no
that really is something
in my mind i'm always at Toyotathon
no thanks
it's about time
yeah!
ok
i thought this for so many years. tbh i still think it's the wrong one
::makes 'i don't know' sound::
that's my time. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: A tale of grandma and the cat
item.dc:creator: ExistenceIsPainWasTaken

item.title: Calling all Nerds, Dorks, and Geeks
item.description:
If you haven't already watched X-Men 97, what are you waiting for? It's the best thing Marvel's put out in years
So originally this was supposed to be a Power Ranger dump but I had so many other dorky memes saved to my phone that I just threw the all together just to clear out my phones memory. So fair warning, about half of these are Power Ranger related
TMNT/MMPR comic crossover was one of the most fun graphic novels I've read in quite some time. Haven't read the sequel series yet but I'm hoping to get it from the library as soon as it's available
Luna Tax
item.dc:creator: DuncanHillsCoffee4Life

item.title: I made an emotional support chicken for my daughter's friend. She's beginning to come out, so I tried to incorporate the lesbian flag into it, is it too subtle?
item.dc:creator: liz4tin

item.title: HR is not your friend. Your employer is not your family.
item.description: https://www.theguardian.com/money/2024/apr/03/human-resources-hr-departments-us-workers Just a friendly reminder that the Human Resources (HR) department works for the company and the company’s interests and not you own. Management may want you to think that you’re all a “family”, but family members don’t limit your sick time. And HR might be made up of some very nice people, who have to follow thick policies approved by management and you likely had to sign an agreement saying you would follow all the policies. If you find yourself in a position where your instinct is telling you that this “isn’t right”. It’s time to reach out. Here’s are a few ways to do that which can help you. For full disclosure, I have not and do not work in Human Resources or in any area closely related to such. Just years of experience working the corporate treadmill.
item.dc:creator: halfabubbleoff

item.description: Browsing my phone, tried calling my friends but they are all asleep. I am desperate for a hug. I just want to be happy. I don't want to be like this.
item.dc:creator: myfanwy16

item.title: In 1925, Coca Cola released a souvenir keychain in the shape of a swastika. Before the Nazis came along, the swastika symbolized good luck in the United States, as it did in India
item.dc:creator: ImpatientMoth

item.title: Gladys Knight and The Pips_ Jack Black, Ben Stiller and Robert Downey Jr. - Happy 80th Birthday Gladys!
item.description:
Birth name: Gladys Maria Knight Born: May 28, 1944 (age 80) Atlanta, Georgia, U.S.
Photo Lester CohenGetty Images for NARAS
Gladys Knight arrives for the Recording Academy's Special Merit Awards Ceremony at the Wilshire Ebell Theatre in Los Angeles, California, on February 3, 2024. Michael Tran/AFP via Getty Images
Midnight Train To Georgia - Gladys Knight and The Pips on The Midnight Special March 8, 1974
item.dc:creator: tolson9
